javascript: Build a vanilla JS utility library focusing on array manipulation, closures, and asynchronous Promises without any frameworks.
typescript: Migrate a small JavaScript project to TypeScript, focusing on defining strict interfaces and generic types.
node.js: Create a REST API with custom middleware for logging and authentication using core Node.js modules.
react: Develop a dynamic UI focusing on functional components, custom hooks, state management, and side effects.
vue: Build a Single Page Application utilizing the Vue Composition API and Vuex/Pinia for state management.
angular: Develop a component-driven Angular application emphasizing RxJS observables and dependency injection.
next.js: Implement a server-rendered blog using Next.js App Router, demonstrating Server Components and static site generation.
react native: Create a cross-platform mobile app using React Native that accesses native device features like the camera or GPS.
css: Build a responsive, mobile-first layout utilizing modern CSS Grid and Flexbox techniques.
scss: Refactor a monolithic CSS file into modular SCSS using variables, mixins, and nested selectors.
tailwind: Rapidly prototype a landing page using Tailwind CSS utility classes, focusing on custom configuration and responsive breakpoints.
styled components: Implement a dark/light theme toggle in a React app using the ThemeProvider from styled-components.
css modules: Scope styles locally in a component-based application using CSS Modules to eliminate global namespace collisions.
redux toolkit: Refactor a legacy Redux application to use Redux Toolkit's createSlice and configureStore for simplified state logic.
react query: Implement server-side state caching, background fetching, and optimistic UI updates using TanStack Query.
graphql: Design a GraphQL schema and query specific nested data efficiently from a backend to reduce over-fetching.
apollo: Integrate Apollo Client into a React app to manage local and remote data with GraphQL mutations.
axios: Create an API service layer utilizing Axios interceptors to globally handle authentication tokens and error responses.
testing library: Write a suite of behavioral tests focusing on user interactions and accessibility roles using React Testing Library.
jest: Configure a Jest test suite with mocked dependencies to achieve high code coverage for a suite of utility functions.
vitest: Write a suite of unit and integration tests for existing components to establish test-driven development habits.
cypress: Develop end-to-end (E2E) test flows that simulate a user logging in and completing a checkout process using Cypress.
jasmine: Set up a behavioral-driven development (BDD) test suite describing component specifications using Jasmine.
msw: Mock network requests at the service worker level using MSW to enable offline development and deterministic testing.
visual regression testing: Integrate a visual regression tool to automatically detect unexpected CSS changes across different viewports.
vite: Migrate an older Webpack or CRA project to Vite to demonstrate understanding of modern, esbuild-powered bundling.
webpack: Configure a custom Webpack build from scratch, implementing loaders for assets and plugins for bundle optimization.
git: Execute a complex Git rebase to squash commits and resolve merge conflicts in a feature branch before opening a Pull Request.
monorepos: Set up a monorepo using Turborepo or Nx, sharing a UI component library and ESLint config across multiple applications.
performance: Profile a web application using browser DevTools and optimize rendering by memoizing heavy components.
lighthouse: Audit a webpage using Lighthouse and systematically fix issues to achieve a 90+ score across all four categories.
code splitting: Implement dynamic imports in a frontend app to lazy-load routes and significantly reduce the initial JavaScript payload.
accessibility: Audit an existing webpage using Lighthouse or axe-core and remediate issues with semantic HTML and proper contrast.
aria: Implement complex custom UI controls (like an accordion or modal) utilizing proper WAI-ARIA attributes for screen readers.
keyboard ux: Refactor a web application to ensure 100% of its interactive elements are fully navigable and usable without a mouse.
internationalization: Integrate an i18n library into a web app, extracting hardcoded strings and supporting dynamic language switching.
storybook: Develop a small UI component library and document its various states visually using Storybook.
design tokens: Extract hardcoded CSS hex values and spacing units into a centralized JSON design token system.
figma: Translate a multi-screen Figma prototype into pixel-perfect frontend code, adhering strictly to the provided design system.
react router: Build a multi-page Single Page Application (SPA) utilizing nested routes, layouts, and route loaders.
react hook form: Build a complex, multi-step wizard form emphasizing uncontrolled components and minimal re-renders using React Hook Form.
zod: Implement strict schema validation for API payloads and form inputs using Zod to ensure end-to-end type safety.
forms: Design an accessible, validated form that handles asynchronous submission, error states, and optimistic UI updates.
tanstack table: Implement a headless data grid with sorting, filtering, and pagination using TanStack Table.
url state: Synchronize application state (like search filters and pagination) with URL query parameters for shareable links.
framer motion: Add layout animations and gesture-based interactions (like drag-to-dismiss) to UI components using Framer Motion.
animations: Create performant, 60fps CSS animations utilizing the transform and opacity properties to avoid layout thrashing.
responsive design: Implement a fluid typography and layout system that scales seamlessly from mobile screens to ultrawide monitors.
maps: Integrate a mapping library (like Mapbox or Leaflet) to render clustered markers dynamically based on user viewport bounds.
data visualization: Design an interactive dashboard that transforms raw datasets into visually distinct, readable charts.
d3: Build a custom, interactive data visualization (like a scatter plot with tooltips) manipulating the DOM directly with D3.js.
recharts: Implement composed charts using Recharts in React to display time-series data with custom axes and tooltips.
express: Build a RESTful backend service with Express.js featuring custom error-handling middleware and route controllers.
error handling: Implement global error boundaries in the frontend to catch unhandled exceptions and display a graceful fallback UI.
secure ui: Audit an application for XSS vulnerabilities and implement strict HTML sanitization and Content Security Policies.
